prompt: Create an authentic candid daily-life photograph at a lively night market at night, showing a three-quarter body shot of two young women interacting mid-gesture beside glowing food stalls. The woman on the left is an East Asian young woman in her early 20s with messy dark hair tied in a loose bun, wearing an oversized light gray zip-up hoodie with drawstrings and a black shoulder bag strap; her face is anonymized by a flat opaque dark-brown rectangular block. She stands slightly turned toward the right, holding out one small bamboo skewer with a bite-sized piece of grilled street food at the tip, arm extended at chest height in a casual offering gesture. The woman on the right is an African young woman in her early 20s with a high natural curly puff, wearing a black bomber jacket over a white basic T-shirt and carrying a black shoulder bag; her face is also anonymized by a flat opaque dark-brown rectangular block. She leans slightly toward the skewer, one hand raised with fingers loosely open as if about to accept the food, body language suggesting surprise, amusement, and appetite. Use warm amber stall lighting from the left, visible specular highlights on clothing and skin, deep night shadows, and a strong cinematic contrast between orange food-stall glow and cool blue background lights. The background should include one busy street-food stall on the left with trays of food, metal framing, bright exposed bulbs, and blurred shoppers; on the right and far background include dark market silhouettes, neon signage, bokeh lights, and shallow depth of field. Compose from a three-quarter side angle, waist-up to thigh-up framing, natural handheld street photography, realistic lens perspective, candid timing, slight motion in stray hairs and hands, high detail, photorealistic texture, documentary style, no posing, no text.
